1. Cache locality: The amount of cache locality in the system affects the performance of the program.
2. Memory bandwidth: The amount of memory bandwidth available affects the performance of the program.
3. Kernel launch overhead: The time taken for the kernel to execute affects the performance of the program.
4. Branch prediction: The accuracy of branch prediction affects the performance of the program.
5. NUMA placement: The placement of the CPU and GPU affects the performance of the program.
6. PCIe transfer: The transfer speed of the PCIe interface affects the performance of the program.
7. KV cache reuse: The reuse of the kernel
